name: Antipasto Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced Muenster, Brick, or Provolone cheese (etc.)
2/3 cup Low-fat Caesar or Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pasta according to package directions.
2. While the pasta is cooking, combine roasted peppers, artichoke hearts, cheese, mushrooms, onion, and basil in a large bowl.
3. When the pasta is done, drain and rinse with cold water. Drain well and add pasta and dressing to the bowl; toss well.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
